prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.9 kg; Height 175.9 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.7%; 3 months ago 6.5%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.9kg; 9 months ago 77.8kg; 6 months ago 76.9kg; 3 months ago 74.8kg; current 78.9kg), Height (12 months ago 175.9cm; 9 months ago 175.9cm; 6 months ago 175.9cm; 3 months ago 175.9cm; current 175.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 146mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 145mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 275mg/g; 9 months ago 347mg/g; 6 months ago 247mg/g; 3 months ago 334mg/g; current 309mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 158mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
